blocks.text: Go implementation is owned by internal/lock.

rows: flock(2) exclusive advisory lock on Unix; claim-file emulation on Windows
waits until the lock is acquired or ctx is done

blocks.text: This primitive does not use sync.Mutex or sync.RWMutex. The concurrency boundary is the OS/local lock, not an actor state guard.

The production riido-task-db.v1 adapter is internal/agentbridge/controlplane/taskdbplane. Guarded mutation belongs to internal/taskdb, while taskdbplane alone may read-modify-write task DB, runtime registry, and lease sidecar under the same lock.
